description:
TokenPrices.glpPrice(IGlpManager) (contracts/common/TokenPrices.sol#120-132) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- avgAum = (aums[0] + aums[1]) / 2 (contracts/common/TokenPrices.sol#123)
	- scaleToPrecision(avgAum * 1e18 / glpSupply,30) (contracts/common/TokenPrices.sol#128)
markdown:
[TokenPrices.glpPrice(IGlpManager)](contracts/common/TokenPrices.sol#L120-L132) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- [avgAum = (aums[0] + aums[1]) / 2](contracts/common/TokenPrices.sol#L123)
	- [scaleToPrecision(avgAum * 1e18 / glpSupply,30)](contracts/common/TokenPrices.sol#L128)

description:
OrigamiGmxManager.buyUsdgQuote(uint256,address) (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#723-744) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- amountAfterFees = fromAmount * (basisPointsDivisor - feeBasisPoints) / basisPointsDivisor (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#742)
	- usdgAmountOut = gmxVault.adjustForDecimals(amountAfterFees * price / pricePrecision,fromToken,usdg) (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#743)
markdown:
[OrigamiGmxManager.buyUsdgQuote(uint256,address)](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L723-L744) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- [amountAfterFees = fromAmount * (basisPointsDivisor - feeBasisPoints) / basisPointsDivisor](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L742)
	- [usdgAmountOut = gmxVault.adjustForDecimals(amountAfterFees * price / pricePrecision,fromToken,usdg)](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L743)

description:
OrigamiGmxManager.getFeeBasisPoints(address,uint256,bool) (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#767-813) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- averageDiff = targetAmount (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#808)
	- taxBps = taxBasisPoints * averageDiff / targetAmount (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#811)
	- targetAmount = gmxVault.tokenWeights(_token) * usdgSupply / gmxVault.totalTokenWeights() (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#792-794)
markdown:
[OrigamiGmxManager.getFeeBasisPoints(address,uint256,bool)](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L767-L813) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- [averageDiff = targetAmount](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L808)
	- [taxBps = taxBasisPoints * averageDiff / targetAmount](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L811)
	- [targetAmount = gmxVault.tokenWeights(_token) * usdgSupply / gmxVault.totalTokenWeights()](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L792-L794)

description:
Reentrancy in RepricingToken.addPendingReserves(uint256) (contracts/common/RepricingToken.sol#161-169):
	External calls:
	- IERC20(reserveToken).safeTransferFrom(msg.sender,address(this),amount) (contracts/common/RepricingToken.sol#165)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _checkpointAndAddReserves(amount) (contracts/common/RepricingToken.sol#167)
		- lastVestingCheckpoint = block.timestamp (contracts/common/RepricingToken.sol#254)
	- _checkpointAndAddReserves(amount) (contracts/common/RepricingToken.sol#167)
		- pendingReserves = outstanding + newReserves (contracts/common/RepricingToken.sol#253)
	- _checkpointAndAddReserves(amount) (contracts/common/RepricingToken.sol#167)
		- vestedReserves = _vestedReserves (contracts/common/RepricingToken.sol#252)
markdown:
Reentrancy in [RepricingToken.addPendingReserves(uint256)](contracts/common/RepricingToken.sol#L161-L169):
	External calls:
	- [IERC20(reserveToken).safeTransferFrom(msg.sender,address(this),amount)](contracts/common/RepricingToken.sol#L165)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [_checkpointAndAddReserves(amount)](contracts/common/RepricingToken.sol#L167)
		- [lastVestingCheckpoint = block.timestamp](contracts/common/RepricingToken.sol#L254)
	- [_checkpointAndAddReserves(amount)](contracts/common/RepricingToken.sol#L167)
		- [pendingReserves = outstanding + newReserves](contracts/common/RepricingToken.sol#L253)
	- [_checkpointAndAddReserves(amount)](contracts/common/RepricingToken.sol#L167)
		- [vestedReserves = _vestedReserves](contracts/common/RepricingToken.sol#L252)
